name: godot-codex
description: Automate Godot 4 project inspection, imports, exports, and scripts from Codex using a local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Bring Godot 4 into Codex with headless project inspection, imports, exports, and script execution through a local MCP server tuned for game-development workflows.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Godot project and list its export presets
Run headless import for this Godot project
Export this Godot build using the Windows preset
